title: Renna (disambiguation)
content:
'''Renna''' can refer to:
*[[Private/Legends|Private]] [[Renna (Human)|Renna]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] soldier in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
*[[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] entrepreneur [[Renna (Rodian)|Renna]], owner of [[Renna's Transport Service]].
*[[Renna Strego]], a spacer and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] whose [[Species/Legends|species]] is unknown.
{{Disambig}}
